data.requirements:
1. Senior Smart Contract Engineer
2. Senior Backend Engineer (Rust)
3. Staff Security Engineer
data.job_description: Example Labs is building an L2 perpetuals DEX. We're hiring three senior engineers to lead smart-contract development, the backend exchange infrastructure, and a security-remediation workstream. You will work directly with the cofounders in a minimal-process environment and own your area end to end.
data.apply_info: Email jobs@example-labs.xyz with CV and a recent contract / project you're proud of.
